entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop studied, Pennisetum americanum (L.) Leeke

entities.name: DURATION OF THE VEGETATIVE PHASE
entities.description: The length of the vegetative growth stage, also referred to as DVP

entities.name: PRODUCTIVE TILLERS PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of tillers per plant that produce grain

entities.name: MAINSHOOT GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The grain yield produced by the main shoot of the plant

entities.name: TILLER GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The grain yield produced by the tillers of the plant

entities.name: DAYLENGTH EXTENSIONS
entities.description: The technique used to vary the duration of the vegetative phase

entities.name: HYBRID 841A X J104
entities.description: The specific pearl millet hybrid used in the field study

entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: The city in India where the field study was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the field study was conducted

entities.name: TILLER APPEARANCE
entities.description: The rate and process of tiller emergence

entities.name: SHOOT LEAF APPEARANCE
entities.description: The rate and process of leaf appearance on the shoot

entities.name: LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of the leaves

entities.name: STEM GROWTH
entities.description: The growth rate and dry matter accumulation of the stem

entities.name: PANICLE GROWTH
entities.description: The growth rate and development of the panicle

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER SHOOT
entities.description: The measurement of grain yield for an individual shoot

entities.name: THERMAL TIME
entities.description: A measure of heat accumulation used to describe shoot development

entities.name: DEGREE DAYS
entities.description: The unit of measurement for thermal time, denoted as °Cd

entities.name: PANICLE INITIATION TO FLOWERING
entities.description: The growth phase GS2, measured in degree days

entities.name: FLOWERING TO MATURITY
entities.description: The growth phase GS3, measured in degree days

entities.name: TILLER APICAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The development of the apex of the tiller

entities.name: DRY MATTER ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The rate of accumulation of dry matter per plant

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass at maturity
